# AJCreates — Learn Card Magic
# https://ajcreates.dev/learn-card-magic
# This file follows the llms.txt standard for AI agent discoverability.

> A comprehensive resource for learning card magic — step-by-step tutorials, video demonstrations, and articles covering beginner to advanced techniques.

## About
- Author: AJCreates
- Website: https://ajcreates.dev/learn-card-magic
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ajcreates

## Sections

### Tutorials
Step-by-step written guides for card tricks and sleight of hand.
- /learn-card-magic/tutorials/ — All tutorials, organised by difficulty
- /learn-card-magic/tutorials/ambitious-card/ — The Ambitious Card (Beginner)
- /learn-card-magic/tutorials/double-lift/ — The Double Lift (Beginner)
- /learn-card-magic/tutorials/card-to-impossible-location/ — Card to Impossible Location (Intermediate)
- /learn-card-magic/tutorials/one-handed-riffle-shuffle/ — One-Handed Riffle Shuffle (Advanced)

### Video Gallery
Video demonstrations and tutorials, sourced from YouTube.
- /learn-card-magic/videos/ — Full gallery with search, filter, and sort
- /learn-card-magic/videos/ambitious-card-tutorial/ — Ambitious Card Full Tutorial
- /learn-card-magic/videos/double-lift-masterclass/ — Double Lift Masterclass
- /learn-card-magic/videos/card-to-impossible-location/ — Card to Impossible Location
- /learn-card-magic/videos/one-handed-riffle-shuffle/ — One-Handed Riffle Shuffle in 4 Weeks
- /learn-card-magic/videos/3-card-tricks-5-minutes/ — 3 Mind-Blowing Card Tricks in 5 Minutes
- /learn-card-magic/videos/charlier-cut-tutorial/ — The Charlier Cut Tutorial

### Blog
Articles on card magic theory, psychology, gear, and performance.
- /learn-card-magic/blog/ — All posts
- /learn-card-magic/blog/5-tricks-every-beginner-should-learn/ — The 5 Card Tricks Every Beginner Should Learn First
- /learn-card-magic/blog/psychology-of-card-magic/ — The Psychology of Card Magic
- /learn-card-magic/blog/how-to-choose-your-first-deck/ — How to Choose Your First Deck of Cards

## Machine-readable data
- /learn-card-magic/sitemap-index.xml — Full sitemap
- /learn-card-magic/robots.txt — Crawl rules
